Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.builders

Class FlixelPropertyTweenBuilder

java.lang.Object
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.builders.FlixelAbstractTweenBuilder<FlixelPropertyTween,FlixelPropertyTweenBuilder>
me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.builders.FlixelPropertyTweenBuilder
All Implemented Interfaces:
FlixelTweenBuilder<FlixelPropertyTween>
public final class FlixelPropertyTweenBuilder extends FlixelAbstractTweenBuilder<FlixelPropertyTween,FlixelPropertyTweenBuilder>
Fluent builder for FlixelPropertyTween. Use getter/setter goals via addGoal(me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.settings.FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenPropertyGoal.FlixelTweenPropertyFloatGetter, float, me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.tween.settings.FlixelTweenSettings.FlixelTweenPropertyGoal.FlixelTweenPropertyFloatSetter). setObject(Object) is required before start(). Chain ends with start().

    Description

    Creates a new property tween builder.

    setFieldLabel(@Nullable String fieldLabel)
    Optional label for FlixelPropertyTween.isTweenOf(Object, String) when matching field paths.

    setObject(@NotNull Object tweenObject)
    Required: the logical object this tween animates (for FlixelPropertyTween.isTweenOf(Object, String)).
    FlixelPropertyTween
    start()
    Builds the tween from the current configuration, adds it to the global tween manager, starts it, and returns the started tween.

  • Constructor Details

    • FlixelPropertyTweenBuilder

      public FlixelPropertyTweenBuilder()
      Creates a new property tween builder. Use FlixelTween.tween(FlixelPropertyTween.class, FlixelPropertyTweenBuilder.class).
